generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
root.title: Something went wrong.
root.description: The application encountered an unexpected error. Please reload the page or contact support if the issue persists.
offline.banner: Network connection is unavailable. Changes that require the server may fail until you are back online.
feature.search.title: Search failed to load
feature.search.description: The search module encountered an error. Retry to continue without reloading the application.
feature.knowledge.title: Knowledge base failed to load
feature.knowledge.description: The editor or knowledge browser encountered an error. Retry to continue without reloading the application.
api.unavailable: Knowledgebase API is unavailable. Sign in and ensure the app SDK is connected.
api.unavailable.ai: Knowledgebase API is unavailable. AI actions require a connected backend.
api.unavailable.chat: Knowledgebase API is unavailable. Chat requires a connected backend.
api.unavailable.streamRewrite: Knowledgebase API is unavailable. Stream rewrite requires a connected backend.
api.unavailable.speech: Knowledgebase API is unavailable. Speech-to-text requires a connected backend.
api.unavailable.image: Knowledgebase API is unavailable. Image generation requires a connected backend.
api.unavailable.search: Knowledgebase API is unavailable. Search synthesis requires a connected backend.
api.unavailable.wechat: Knowledgebase API is unavailable. WeChat features require a connected backend.
api.unavailable.drive: Drive integration is unavailable. Enterprise drive features require a connected Drive SDK.
api.unavailable.sdk: Knowledgebase app SDK is not configured.
validation.spaceRequired: Create a knowledge space before using this feature.
validation.urlInvalidScheme: Only http and https links are supported.
validation.driveSpaceMissing: Knowledge space does not have an associated Drive space.
validation.driveNodeIdMissing: Drive node id is missing for the selected item.
validation.desktopOnly: This action is only available in the desktop app.
validation.documentIdRequired: A Knowledgebase document id is required for this action.
validation.kbIdRequired: Knowledge space id is required for this action.
validation.parentFolderNotFound: Parent folder was not found in the knowledge browser tree.
validation.parentDriveNodeMissing: Parent folder does not have an associated Drive node.
validation.transferSameKnowledgeBase: Source and target knowledge bases must differ.
validation.documentNotIndexed: Document content can only be persisted for indexed Knowledgebase documents.
validation.importDocumentIdMissing: Import failed because the document id is missing.
operation.pdfFetchFailed: Failed to load the PDF document.
operation.mediaUrlUnresolved: Upload succeeded but the media URL is not available yet. Re-insert from the asset library.
operation.failed: The operation failed. Please try again.
operation.unsupported: This operation is not supported for the selected item.
operation.speechNoResult: Speech-to-text did not return any text.
operation.imageUrlMissing: Image generation did not return a usable image URL.
operation.documentResolveFailed: The source document could not be resolved.
runtime.iamMissing: Knowledgebase IAM runtime is not configured.
runtime.sdkPortsMissing: Knowledgebase PC SDK ports are not configured.
runtime.providerRequired: This hook must be used within KnowledgebaseRuntimeProvider.
http.unauthorized: Your session has expired or is invalid. Please sign in again.
http.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
http.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
http.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
http.server: The server encountered an error. Please try again later.
http.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
